speaker: Luca
text: Guys, I have amazing news! I asked Sara out and she said YES! I'm the happiest ❤️

speaker: Sara
text: Ahahah Luca, don’t say it like that in public 🙈

speaker: Marta
text: That’s wonderful! Finally you two made up your minds!

speaker: Gianni
text: About time... you tortured us for months with those awkward looks 😂

speaker: Sara
text: Well, sometimes the best things come when you least expect them.

speaker: Luca
text: I swear I’ve never been this happy in my life.

speaker: Sara
text: Only if you bring your cheesecake, Marta!

speaker: Luca
text: Perfect, it’ll be the best night ever.

speaker: Sara
text: Yes, but promise me you won’t give one of your long speeches in front of everyone 😂
